category_sources: source_facts.description says Infrastructure as Code tool for AWS Organizations; official README says AWS Organization Formation is an IaC tool for AWS Organizations: https://github.com/org-formation/org-formation-cli
display_name_sources: Official README heading is AWS Organization Formation and notes org-formation as the CLI name: https://github.com/org-formation/org-formation-cli
docs_sources: Official repository contains a docs directory and links from the README to organization resources and CLI reference docs: https://github.com/org-formation/org-formation-cli/tree/master/docs
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project URL: https://github.com/org-formation/org-formation-cli
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe AWS Organizations IaC, CloudFormation annotations, and CLI usage.
